verdict: PASS — all automated gates green; visual TUI criteria deferred to user manual verification

environment.type: PostgreSQL test clusters (connect-or-fail, not Docker rebuild for this project)
environment.note: This is a Go CLI/TUI project; there is no Docker-compose env to rebuild. The Phase-1 'environment' is the live PG test clusters, verified healthy. All integration tests connect directly to 127.0.0.1:21914-21918 (internal/postgres/testing.go); no t.Skipf guard fired, so the full integration suite ran live against PG 14-18.

gates.evidence: rm -f ./bin/pgcenter && make build → exit 0; binary produced (18 MB), ldflags gitBranch=feature/010-overview-dashboard.

go test -race -p 1 -timeout 300s ./... → all packages ok, TEST_EXIT=0. Total coverage 69.7%. No SKIP, no FAIL across internal/stat, internal/query, top. Feature packages: internal/pretty 100%, internal/query 100%, internal/stat 87.5%, internal/view 97.1%, top 44.0%.
gosec over project packages (internal/top/cmd/record/profile): 73 files, 11301 lines, Issues: 0, Nosec: 7. Clean.

1 stdlib advisory GO-2026-5037 (crypto/x509 inefficient hostname parsing) — toolchain go1.25.10, fixed in go1.25.11. NOT in project/feature code; reachable only via stdlib TLS path (postgres.go io.ReadFull, cobra Execute). 0 vulns in imported packages, 3 in required modules not called by our code. Resolution = CI toolchain bump to go1.25.11+, not a code change. Recorded as minor/environmental finding.

All 21 feature-changed Go files are gofmt-clean. gofmt -l flags two PRE-EXISTING files unrelated to feature 010 — internal/query/wal_test.go (last touched by 1ebf907, issue #132) and internal/stat/procpidstat_test.go (99c8413, feature 008) — struct-field-alignment only; neither is in the feature's Files-to-modify set. Remaining gofmt-l entries are under .claude/worktrees/ (leftover agent worktrees, not part of the codebase). Recorded as minor pre-existing repo debt, not a feature regression.

lintDeferredToCI: golangci-lint is NOT available locally (v1 config vs v2 tool incompatibility). Local proxy used: `go vet ./...` (clean) + `gofmt -l .` (feature files clean). The full golangci-lint + gosec run is deferred to CI; gosec ran locally and is clean.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Compact-mode output byte-identical to current behavior (refactor behavior-preserving) — tech-spec AC #2, user-spec
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Task-03 writer/golden tests: top/stat_test.go Test_renderSysstat_compact, Test_renderPgstat_compact, Test_renderSysstat_compactUnchanged — assert byte-for-byte compact rows against bytes.Buffer. All green.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: n/a degradation is a literal distinct from 0/empty; one failing source does not blank the others — tech-spec AC #4, user-spec
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Formatter tests internal/pretty/pretty_test.go (TestCeil, TestReserveWidth, TestRateUnit_boundary) + composer tests top/stat_test.go (Test_renderSysstat_verboseFirstTickNA, Test_renderSysstat_verboseFilesystNA, Test_renderPgstat_verboseNA) verify n/a sentinel rendering and per-source independence. Green.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GUC + data_directory scan in lockstep with SelectCommonProperties — tech-spec backward-compat / Task-04
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: internal/query/common_test.go Test_CommonQueries + internal/stat/postgres_test.go TestGetPostgresProperties verify SELECT column set and .Scan(...) arity stay in lockstep with the 5 new fields (max_worker_processes, max_logical_replication_workers, max_parallel_workers, wal_segment_size, data_directory). Green live on PG 14-18.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: First-tick deltas n/a + re-arm (toggle does not trigger Reset; tiering keeps stale not n/a) — user-spec, tech-spec Decision 2/9; Task-02/07/09
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: top/verbose_test.go Test_toggleVerbose (flip + persist, no Reset). internal/stat/stat_test.go: Test_verboseCollectState_firstTickNotThrottled, Test_verboseCollectState_throttlesSlowSource, Test_verboseCollectState_autoResumes, Test_latencyGuardThreshold, TestCollector_Update_DbSizeThrottle, TestCollector_Update_Verbose. Green.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: No view-count / keybinding / existing-panel regressions; all unit+integration tests pass — tech-spec AC #6, user-spec
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Full suite green (TEST_EXIT=0). internal/view/view.go diff is exactly one line (+Verbose bool field, zero-value false); internal/view/view_test.go has NO content diff vs master (no view-count assertion change). View tests (TestViews_Configure, TestView_VersionOK, etc.) all PASS. top/keybindings.go adds only the `v` binding. No new view registered.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: New aggregate queries version-correct on PG 14-18 and degrade to n/a — tech-spec AC #8, user-spec; Task-05
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: internal/query/overview_test.go Test_OverviewQueries (workload/databases/databases_size/workers/wal_size/send_recv) ran live across 5 PG versions (subtests #00..#04) all PASS; Test_OverviewQueries_Templates (replication lag/slots) PASS per-version; Test_SelectStatBgwriterQuery + Test_StatBgwriterQueries cover the PG14-16 / 17 / 18 bgwr/ckpt split (pg_stat_bgwriter vs pg_stat_checkpointer). All green.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: VISUAL: verbose band geometry + height-guard on several terminal sizes (layout() recompute, cmdline shift, dbstat shrink; fallback to compact + hint on short terminal) — user-spec, tech-spec AC #5, Task-06
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Pure topBandLayout is unit-tested (top/layout_test.go), but the rendered geometry across real terminal sizes requires a running TUI — no E2E harness in the project. Manual TUI verification required.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: VISUAL: verbose rows consistent with the full B/N/F panels and d/r/b screens (same device, same number, ceil rounding) — user-spec, tech-spec AC #3, Task-08
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Composer math is unit-tested against fixed structs, but cross-checking the live verbose row against the full panel/screen for the same max-%util device requires a running TUI against a live instance. Manual verification required.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: VISUAL: first-tick collecting... hint clears; verbose persists over detail screens; toggle off → compact — user-spec, Task-09
acceptanceCriteria.evidence: Underlying first-tick n/a and re-arm logic unit-tested (above), but the cmdline hint lifecycle and on-screen persistence across screen switches are observable only in the running TUI. Manual verification required.

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: Verbose toggle expands both panels (sysstat +3, pgstat +5); layout recompute + height-guard
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: TUI render not automatable (no E2E harness)
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: Run ./bin/pgcenter top on a wide terminal
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: Press v: both panels expand (3 iostat/nicstat/filesyst rows left, 5 workload/databases/workers/replication/bgwr-ckpt rows right); dbstat shrinks; cmdline shifts down. On a short terminal verbose must NOT expand and a cmdline hint must show. Layout must not break.

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: Row consistency with full B/N/F panels and d/r/b screens
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: Verbose on, against a live instance with disk/net/fs activity
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: Compare the iostat/nicstat/filesyst verbose rows to the full B/N/F panels for the same max-%util device — numbers match (verbose ceil-rounds to integers, full panels show fractions). Compare databases/replication/bgwr rows to d/r/b screens.

deferredToPostDeploy.criterion: First-tick collecting... hint / stale-on-throttle / degradation paths
deferredToPostDeploy.reason: TUI + special instance states (standby, archive_mode=off, remote no-PL/Perl)
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationCondition: Observe first refresh; test on standby / archive_mode=off / remote without schema
deferredToPostDeploy.verificationSteps: First tick shows n/a deltas + collecting... in cmdline, clears after first refresh. On standby/no replication: lag/slots/send-recv empty/n/a. archive_mode=off: archiving backlog → n/a. Remote without PL/Perl: iostat/nicstat/filesyst → n/a. Panel never crashes; throttled db-size source holds last value (not n/a).

findings.title: govulncheck advisory GO-2026-5037 in stdlib crypto/x509 (toolchain go1.25.10)
findings.actual: 1 stdlib advisory; fixed in go1.25.11. Not in project/feature code.
findings.reproduction: PATH+=/home/lesovsky/go/bin; govulncheck ./... → exit 3, GO-2026-5037 traced via crypto/x509 in the stdlib TLS path. Resolution: bump Go toolchain to >=1.25.11 in CI; no code change.

findings.title: Pre-existing gofmt drift in two non-feature test files
findings.actual: internal/query/wal_test.go and internal/stat/procpidstat_test.go have struct-field-alignment gofmt drift; both predate feature 010 (commits 1ebf907, 99c8413) and are outside its scope. All 21 feature-changed files are gofmt-clean.
findings.reproduction: gofmt -d internal/query/wal_test.go — alignment-only diff. Optional cleanup; not a feature regression.
